role_summary: the banking accountant manages accounting, reconciliation, and regulatory reporting for  banking and financial operations.
responsibilities: • maintain accurate accounting records for banking transactions   • perform daily bank reconciliations and ledger reviews   • prepare financial statements and regulatory reports   • ensure compliance with rbi guidelines and banking regulations   • support statutory, internal, and co ncurrent audits   • coordinate with branches and operations teams
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong knowledge of banking accounting and regulations   • attention to detail and compliance focus
